reviews.comment:
Sencillo. Muy agradable y amplio adentro y con un sector de mesitas bajo los arboles . Excelente atencion y limpieza.

(Translated by Google)
Simple. Very pleasant and spacious inside, with a seating area under the trees. Excellent service and cleanliness.

reviews.comment:
Miren yo pase, por ahí, de Domingo a las 3:30hs y las 4 hs de la mañana, paramos para ir al baño, estaban habilitados solo 3 baños y totalmente sucios,es una pena aun en el tiempo de Covid, tiene que haber más higiene, y el que atiende el surtidor estaba dormido, así que todo bien, pero hay gente que si quiere trabajar, denle el trabajo, bajamos y nadie, nos fuimos muy decepcionados.

(Translated by Google)
Look, I passed by there on Sunday at 3:30 and 4:00 in the morning. We stopped to use the restroom, and there were only three bathrooms open, and they were completely filthy. It's a shame, even during Covid times. There needs to be more hygiene. And the guy who works at the pump was asleep, so that's fine, but if people want to work, give them the job. We got out and there was no one there. We left very disappointed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHZ1lMS3hRRRAB
